arts.ttl: Kylian Mbappe PSG record could be broken by 32-goal sensation in Arsenal Champions League semi-final
arts.sum: Ousmane Dembele could break a Paris Saint-Germain record set by Kylian Mbappe when Les Parisiens face Arsenal in the first leg of their Champions League semi-final.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta gives triple Arsenal injury update and delivers Champions League rallying cry before PSG
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta provides the latest on three of Arsenal's injured troops ahead of Tuesday's Champions League semi-final first leg showdown with Paris Saint-Germain.

arts.ttl: Arsenal-PSG Combined XI: Donnarumma or Raya? Neves or Ødegaard? Barcola or Saka?
arts.sum: Arsenal host Paris Saint-Germain tomorrow night at the Emirates Stadium for the first leg of their Champions League semi-final. Ahead of the game, Get French Football News decided to put…

arts.ttl: Arteta urges Arsenal to 'live the moment' vs. PSG
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta said Arsenal are feeling the weight of history, but urged his players to "live the moment" as they attempt to reach the Champions League final.

arts.ttl: Bring your boots – Mikel Arteta urges Arsenal fans to ‘play every ball’ vs PSG
arts.sum: Arsenal will contest their first semi-final on Europe’s grandest stage in 16 years when they host Paris St Germain.

arts.ttl: Gabriel Martinelli responds to Arsenal contract question ahead of PSG Champions League battle
arts.sum: Gabriel Martinelli responds to a question about his Arsenal contract situation ahead of Tuesday's Champions League semi-final first leg against Paris Saint-Germain.

arts.ttl: Luis Enrique makes Liverpool dig as he sends Arsenal warning ahead of PSG clash
arts.sum: Luis Enrique will lead PSG against Arsenal in the Champions League semi-finals on Tuesday, with the Ligue 1 giants having beaten Liverpool in the last 16 earlier this season

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta lays down gauntlet to Arsenal stars ahead of PSG tie - 'We want more'
arts.sum: Arsenal will play Paris Saint-Germain for a place in the Champions League final over the next few weeks and Mikel Arteta wants his players to seize their chance to make history

arts.ttl: Luis Enrique makes Ousmane Dembele decision as PSG name squad for Arsenal fixture
arts.sum: PSG travel to Arsenal for the first leg of their Champions League semi-final on Tuesday night, with Luis Enrique having named his travelling squad for the game on Monday

arts.ttl: PSG submit Arsenal complaint to UEFA ahead of Champions League semi-final
arts.sum: PSG and Arsenal are at loggerheads ahead of Tuesday's Champions League semi-final first leg, with chiefs at the Ligue 1 champions now urging UEFA to get involved
